jsonLd.title: Junior SEO Specialist at Zappfresh
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate SEO Specialist with drive and ambition, Zappfresh in Kochi is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About Zappfresh:
Zappfresh is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Conduct competitor analysis and market benchmarking
• Optimize product pages for search visibility and conversion
• Execute digital marketing campaigns across Google, Meta, and other channels
• Collaborate with logistics partners to ensure timely delivery
• Manage marketplace relationships with Amazon, Flipkart, and Meesho
• Manage product listings, pricing, and promotions on the platform
• Monitor and improve Net Promoter Score (NPS) and customer satisfaction

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Google Analytics
• Proficiency in Customer Segmentation
• Proficiency in Shopify
• Proficiency in Affiliate Marketing
• Proficiency in A/B Testing
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Content Writing
• Proficiency in Influencer Marketing

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Kochi, Kerala, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Zappfresh!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
